subtitle: SPY signal, prior-data only, trade SPXL at today's open.

buy: Buy when at least 3 of the 6 trend checks pass AND VR20/100 < 1.4.
Checks: MOM90>0, MOM100>0, ABVMA100=true, SLP5_1>0, SLP20_1>0, SLP20_3>0.
sell: Sell when score falls to 1 or 0, OR VR20/100 >= 1.4.
definitions: ABVMA100 = SPY Open[t-1] > average of SPY Opens[t-1] through [t-100]
VR20/100 = stdev(open-to-open returns over prior 20 days) / stdev(open-to-open returns over prior 100 days)

plainEnglish: Buy SPXL when trend breadth is strong (3+ of 6 checks true) and volatility regime is calm (VR20/100 < 1.4).
Sell SPXL when breadth weakens to 1 or 0 checks, or volatility regime spikes (VR20/100 >= 1.4).
All indicators use prior data (t-1 and earlier), and trades are modeled open-to-open in SPXL.

indicators.label: Score (6 checks)
indicators.description: Count of MOM90, MOM100, ABVMA100, SLP5_1, SLP20_1, SLP20_3 that pass.

indicators.label: ABVMA100
indicators.description: SPY Open[t-1] > average SPY Open over prior 100 days.
